message: spec-verify-check.py verification command #3 (`node bin/cli.js version --format yaml`, criterion_ref spec-verify://verification_commands/2) reported: expected exit 0, got 1. Root cause (verified, not the implementation): the contract in .devlyn/criteria.generated.md:34 (mirrored in .devlyn/plan.md:27) authored this command with the non-canonical key `expect_exit` instead of the schema's canonical `exit_code` (.claude/skills/_shared/expected.schema.json:22, item schema has additionalProperties:false). spec-verify-check.py reads only `exit_code` (.claude/skills/_shared/spec-verify-check.py:4117: `expected_exit = vc.get("exit_code", 0)`), so the unrecognized `expect_exit: 1` key silently defaulted to exit_code 0, producing a false failure when self-staged into .devlyn/spec-verify.json:13. Direct execution of `node bin/cli.js version --format yaml` exits 1 with `Unsupported version format: yaml` (matches criteria requirement '--format yaml exits 1 with an error message'), and the new test 'version rejects unsupported --format value' passes in `node --test tests/`. bin/cli.js and tests/cli.test.js are correct; the contract-authoring key name is the defect.
fix_hint: Rename the `expect_exit` key to `exit_code` in the verification_commands JSON block of .devlyn/criteria.generated.md (<!-- devlyn:verification --> section, all 4 entries) and the mirrored block in .devlyn/plan.md's Acceptance restatement, then re-run spec-verify-check.py to regenerate .devlyn/spec-verify.json from the corrected contract. Do not modify bin/cli.js or tests/cli.test.js for this finding.
